input_param.name: max
input_param.value: [if (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly) then 25 else (if (this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?) then (if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 2 then 1 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 5 then 3 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 8 then 5 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 11 then 10 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 13 then 15 else 25) else 1), 1].max

input_param.name: max
input_param.value: [if (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly) then 25 else (if (this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?) then (if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 2 then 1 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 5 then 3 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 8 then 5 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 11 then 10 else if global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level le 13 then 15 else 25) else 1), 1].max

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': DockAndTrain queued for ' + $trainingStation.knownname + ' (academy=' + $isAcademy + ', immediate=' + $useImmediate + ')'

set_value.name: $debugchance
set_value.exact: if $debuglevel ge 1 and global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug.$EnableDebugLogging then 100 else 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Home config has station+position; preserving both (station=' + $homeStation.idcode + ', sector=' + $homeSector.knownname + ')'
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': assignToStation disabled -> clearing homeStation ' + $homeStation.idcode

do_if.value: not $assignToStation and this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship and this.ship.commander.isclass.station

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': assignToStation disabled -> removing station assignment from commander ' + this.ship.commander.idcode

do_if.value: (not $homeStation? or not $homeStation.exists) and (not $homeSector? or not $homeSector.exists) and this.sector? and this.sector.exists

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': No home configured -> auto-set Home Position to current sector core position in ' + $homeSector.knownname

show_notification.text: 'Galaxy-Miner: set Home Station or Home Position.'

do_if.value: $assignToStation and $homeStation? and $homeStation.exists and $homeStation.isclass.station and (not this.ship.commander? or not this.ship.commander.exists or this.ship.commander == this.ship or this.ship.commander.isclass.station) and ((not this.ship.commander?) or this.ship.commander != $homeStation)
this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Assigned to home station commander ' + $homeStation.idcode + ' (assignment=mining)'

do_if.value: this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?

set_value.name: global.$GT_AIParameters.{this.ship}
set_value.exact: table[ $HomeBase = if $homeStation? and $homeStation.exists then $homeStation else if $homeSector? and $homeSector.exists then $homeSector else if $homePosition? and $homePosition.{1}? and $homePosition.{1}.exists and $homePosition.{1}.isclass.sector then $homePosition.{1} else if $homePosition? and $homePosition.{1}? and $homePosition.{1}.sector? and $homePosition.{1}.sector.exists then $homePosition.{1}.sector else null, $MaxDistance = if $stayAtHome then 0 else $maxGatherDistance, $AutoDeployResourceProbes = $autoDeployResourceProbes, $autoDeployResourceProbes = $autoDeployResourceProbes, $MaxResourceProbesToBuy = this.$maxResourceProbesToBuy, $maxResourceProbesToBuy = this.$maxResourceProbesToBuy, $RequestTime = player.age ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Init complete. homeConfigValid=' + this.$homeConfigValid + ', default=' + (if this.ship.defaultorder? then @this.ship.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ', commander=' + (if this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists then this.ship.commander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', debugChance=' + this.$debugchance
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': v1->v2 patch applied (autoDeploy=' + this.$autoDeployResourceProbes + ', maxProbes=' + this.$maxResourceProbesToBuy + ')'
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': v2->v3 patch applied (blockedstations=' + this.$effectiveBlockedStations.count + ')'
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': v3->v4 patch applied (idleParking=' + this.$idleParking + ')'
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': v4->v5 patch applied (logbookentries=' + this.$logbookentries + ')'

'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Entered main loop. default=' + (if this.ship.defaultorder? then @this.ship.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ', commander=' + (if this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists then this.ship.commander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', homeValid=' + this.$homeConfigValid

set_value.name: $minerBlockedStations
set_value.exact: if $blockedstations? then $blockedstations else (if this.$effectiveBlockedStations? then this.$effectiveBlockedStations else [])

do_elseif.value: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship and this.ship.defaultorder? and this.ship.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.ship.commander.defaultorder?

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': assignToStation runtime-off -> clearing homeStation ' + $homeStation.idcode

do_if.value: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship and this.ship.commander.isclass.station

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': assignToStation runtime-off -> removing station commander ' + this.ship.commander.idcode

do_if.value: this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and not (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Found pending resupply order at ' + @$resupplyData.$Station.knownname + ' (Ammo types=' + $ammoTableCount + ', Unit types=' + $unitTableCount + ') - executing add_build_to_modify_ship'
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': add_build_to_modify_ship OK at ' + $resupplyStation.knownname + ' - waiting up to 900s for GT_Maintenance_Complete'
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': GT_Maintenance_Complete received, resuming mining'
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': resupply wait ended (completion or 900s timeout) - continuing main_loop'
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': add_build_to_modify_ship FAILED at ' + $resupplyStation.knownname + ' - clearing tracking + 5min cooldown'
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': resupply station ' + @$resupplyStation.knownname + ' has no compatible dock (ship size=' + this.ship.docksize + ') - clearing tracking'
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': empty resupply shopping list - clearing tracking'

set_value.name: $stationListRefSector
set_value.exact: if this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists and this.$homeStation.sector? then this.$homeStation.sector else if this.$homeSector? and this.$homeSector.exists then this.$homeSector else this.ship.sector

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': stationList drop ' + $stationCandidate.idcode + ' sector=' + $stationCandidate.sector.knownname + ' dist=' + $stationListGateDistance + ' maxSell=' + this.$maxSellDistance

do_if.value: this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists and this.$homeStation.isoperational and ((not this.$playerStationsOnly) or (this.$homeStation.owner == this.owner))

do_while.value: this.$minerDemandSectorsScanIndex? and this.$minerDemandSectorsScanList? and this.$minerDemandSectorsScanIndex le this.$minerDemandSectorsScanList.count

do_if.value: $sectorStation? and $sectorStation.exists and $sectorStation.isclass.station and $sectorStation.isoperational and ((not this.$playerStationsOnly) or ($sectorStation.owner == this.owner)) and not $targetStations.indexof.{$sectorStation}
this.$minerDemandSectorsScanIndex? and this.$minerDemandSectorsScanList? and this.$minerDemandSectorsScanIndex le this.$minerDemandSectorsScanList.count

do_while.value: this.$minerSectorStationsScanIndex? and this.$minerSectorStationsScanList? and this.$minerSectorStationsScanIndex le this.$minerSectorStationsScanList.count

do_if.value: $sectorStation? and $sectorStation.exists and $sectorStation.isclass.station and $sectorStation.isoperational and ((not this.$playerStationsOnly) or ($sectorStation.owner == this.owner)) and not $targetStations.indexof.{$sectorStation}
this.$minerSectorStationsScanIndex? and this.$minerSectorStationsScanList? and this.$minerSectorStationsScanIndex le this.$minerSectorStationsScanList.count

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Blocked-station filter: before=' + $targetStationsBeforeBlockedFilter + ', after=' + $targetStations.count + ', removed=' + ($targetStationsBeforeBlockedFilter - $targetStations.count)

do_if.value: $demandStation? and $demandStation.exists and ((not this.$playerStationsOnly) or ($demandStation.owner == this.owner)) and not $demandStations.indexof.{$demandStation}

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Loop anchor=' + (if $range? then $range.knownname else 'null') + ', homeStation=' + (if this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists then this.$homeStation.idcode else 'NONE') + ', homeSector=' + (if this.$homeSector? and this.$homeSector.exists then this.$homeSector.knownname else 'NONE') + ', playerStationsOnly=' + this.$playerStationsOnly + ', commander=' + (if this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists then this.ship.commander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', default=' + (if this.ship.defaultorder? then @this.ship.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ', targetStations=' + $targetStations.count + ', demandStations=' + $demandStations.count
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': ship.warebasket empty -> using fallback ware discovery from configured targets'

do_if.value: $candidateWare? and ($candidateWare.waretransport == waretransport.solid or $candidateWare.waretransport == waretransport.liquid) and this.ship.cargo.{$candidateWare}.max gt 0 and (($restrictToShipBasket and $shipMineableBasket.indexof.{$candidateWare}) or (not $restrictToShipBasket)) and not $candidateWares.indexof.{$candidateWare}

do_while.value: this.$minerCandidateScanIndex? and this.$minerCandidateScanDemandStations? and this.$minerCandidateScanIndex le this.$minerCandidateScanDemandStations.count

do_if.value: $candidateWare? and $candidateWare.hastag.minable and ($candidateWare.waretransport == waretransport.solid or $candidateWare.waretransport == waretransport.liquid) and this.ship.cargo.{$candidateWare}.max gt 0 and (($restrictToShipBasket and $shipMineableBasket.indexof.{$candidateWare}) or (not $restrictToShipBasket)) and not $candidateWares.indexof.{$candidateWare}
this.$minerCandidateScanIndex? and this.$minerCandidateScanDemandStations? and this.$minerCandidateScanIndex le this.$minerCandidateScanDemandStations.count

do_while.value: this.$minerBuyOfferScanIndex? and this.$minerBuyOfferScanDemandStations? and this.$minerBuyOfferScanIndex le this.$minerBuyOfferScanDemandStations.count

do_if.value: $candidateWare? and $candidateWare.hastag.minable and this.ship.cargo.{$candidateWare}.max gt 0 and (($restrictToShipBasket and $shipMineableBasket.indexof.{$candidateWare}) or (not $restrictToShipBasket)) and not $candidateWares.indexof.{$candidateWare}
this.$minerBuyOfferScanIndex? and this.$minerBuyOfferScanDemandStations? and this.$minerBuyOfferScanIndex le this.$minerBuyOfferScanDemandStations.count
this.ship.cargo.list? and this.ship.cargo.list.count gt 0 and $demandStations? and $demandStations.count gt 0
$cargoInjectWare? and $cargoInjectWare != null and this.$resourceBasket? and this.$resourceBasket.count gt 0 and (not this.$resourceBasket.indexof.{$cargoInjectWare})

$cargoInjectWare? and $cargoInjectWare != null and $cargoInjectInResourceBasket and not $candidateWares.indexof.{$cargoInjectWare} and $cargoInjectWare.hastag.minable and ($cargoInjectWare.waretransport == waretransport.solid or $cargoInjectWare.waretransport == waretransport.liquid) and this.ship.cargo.{$cargoInjectWare}.count gt 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': CARGO-FIRST inject - ware ' + $cargoInjectWare.name + ' x' + this.ship.cargo.{$cargoInjectWare}.count + ' is in cargo and has a willing primary buyer; appended to candidate set so scoring + primary-delivery can route the ship to deliver instead of stalling at no-candidates wait.'

set_value.name: $noCandHasCargo
set_value.exact: this.ship.cargo.list? and this.ship.cargo.list.count gt 0 and this.ship.cargo.used.all gt 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': No mineable wares. demandStationCount=' + $demandStations.count + ', resourceBasketCount=' + (if this.$resourceBasket? then this.$resourceBasket.count else 0) + ', shipMineableCount=' + (if $shipMineableBasket? then $shipMineableBasket.count else 0) + ', restrictToShipBasket=' + $restrictToShipBasket + ', cargoUsed=' + this.ship.cargo.used.all + '/' + this.ship.cargo.capacity.all + (if $noCandHasCargo then ' (cargo present but NO demand station has capacity for any ware in the bay - all primary buyers are full or the cargo wares are not in any buyer config; lower threshold or add a buyer to free this ship)' else '')

show_notification.text: 'Galaxy-Miner: no mineable wares available for ' + this.ship.knownname

do_if.value: this.$idleParking and this.$minerIdleNoWorkCount ge 5 and this.ship.cargo.count == 0 and (not global.$GT_IdleParkingReleased? or not global.$GT_IdleParkingReleased.{this.ship}?)

set_value.name: $minerIdleHome
set_value.exact: if this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists then this.$homeStation else (if this.$homeSector? and this.$homeSector.exists then this.$homeSector else null)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': idle parking threshold reached - parking at ' + $minerIdleHome.knownname

do_if.value: this.$minerAssignedWare? and this.$minerAssignedStations? and this.$minerAssignedStations.count gt 0

do_while.value: this.$minerCleanupAssignedIndex? and this.$minerAssignedStations? and this.$minerCleanupAssignedIndex le this.$minerAssignedStations.count

do_if.value: this.$minerCleanupAssignedIndex? and this.$minerAssignedStations? and this.$minerCleanupAssignedIndex le this.$minerAssignedStations.count
this.$minerIntentWare? and this.$minerIntentWare != null and this.$minerIntentStations? and this.$minerIntentStations.count gt 0

do_while.value: this.$minerCleanupIntentIndex? and this.$minerIntentStations? and this.$minerCleanupIntentIndex le this.$minerIntentStations.count

do_if.value: this.$minerCleanupIntentIndex? and this.$minerIntentStations? and this.$minerCleanupIntentIndex le this.$minerIntentStations.count

set_value.name: $wareReachabilityRefSector
set_value.exact: if $range? and $range.isclass.sector then $range else (if $range? and $range.sector? then @$range.sector else this.sector)

do_if.value: this.ship.isplayerowned and (if this.$stayAtHome then 0 else this.$maxGatherDistance) le 0 and $wareReachabilityRefSector.isclass.sector and not $wareReachabilityGatherSpaces.indexof.{$wareReachabilityRefSector}

do_while.value: this.$minerGatherFilterIndex? and this.$minerGatherFilterIn? and this.$minerGatherFilterIndex le this.$minerGatherFilterIn.count

do_if.value: $gatherSpaceFilter == this.ship.sector or (this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander.sector? and $gatherSpaceFilter == @this.ship.commander.sector)
this.$minerGatherFilterIndex? and this.$minerGatherFilterIn? and this.$minerGatherFilterIndex le this.$minerGatherFilterIn.count

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Gather sector filter kept=' + $wareReachabilityGatherSpaces.count + ', blacklistGroup=' + (if $gatherSectorBlacklistGroup? then $gatherSectorBlacklistGroup else 'NONE')

do_while.value: this.$minerScoreIndex? and this.$minerScoreCandidateWares? and this.$minerScoreIndex le this.$minerScoreCandidateWares.count

do_if.value: this.$fleetBalancing and global.$GT_MinerIntents? and global.$GT_MinerIntents.{$stationEval}? and global.$GT_MinerIntents.{$stationEval}.{$wareEval}?

$intent? and $intent.$intentAmount? and $intent.$intentAmount gt 0 and $intent.$eta? and $intent.$eta le $intentHorizon and $intent.$phase? and ($intent.$phase == 'mining' or $intent.$phase == 'hauling' or $intent.$phase == 'delivering') and $intentShip? and $intentShip.exists and $intentShip.isoperational and $intentShipIsMinerControlled
this.$minerScoreIndex? and this.$minerScoreCandidateWares? and this.$minerScoreIndex le this.$minerScoreCandidateWares.count
this.ship.cargo.list? and this.ship.cargo.list.count gt 0 and $demandStations? and $demandStations.count gt 0
$cargoWare? and $cargoWare != null and $candidateWares.indexof.{$cargoWare} and this.ship.cargo.{$cargoWare}.count gt 0 and $cargoWare.hastag.minable

set_value.name: $cargoFirstReason
set_value.exact: if $cargoFirstNoScoring then 'no scoring winner' else (if $cargoFirstCargoFull then 'cargo is FULL (' + this.ship.cargo.used.all + '/' + this.ship.cargo.capacity.all + ') - cannot mine more without delivering, scoring picked ' + $selectedWare.name + ' (urgency=' + (if $wareUrgency? and $wareUrgency.{$selectedWare}? then $wareUrgency.{$selectedWare} else 0) + ')' else 'scoring picked ' + $selectedWare.name + ' (urgency=' + (if $wareUrgency? and $wareUrgency.{$selectedWare}? then $wareUrgency.{$selectedWare} else 0) + ') but it is unreachable - no discovered asteroid in range') + '; cargo holds ' + $cargoFirstBestAmount + ' ' + $cargoFirstBestWare.name + ' with a willing primary buyer'

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': CARGO-FIRST override - ' + $cargoFirstReason + '. Switching selected to ' + $cargoFirstBestWare.name + ' so the mining routine delivers existing cargo before mining anything new.'

'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': CARGO-FIRST evaluated but suppressed - ship can keep mining ' + (if $selectedWare? and $selectedWare != null then $selectedWare.name else 'NONE') + ' (reachable, cargoFree=' + this.ship.cargo.free.all + '/' + this.ship.cargo.capacity.all + '). Cargo holds ' + $cargoFirstBestAmount + ' ' + $cargoFirstBestWare.name + ' which will be delivered on the natural mine-then-deliver cycle.'

'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': SCOUT ENTRY (overflow wait): primary-capped ware ' + (if this.$activeMiningWare? and this.$activeMiningWare != null then this.$activeMiningWare.name else 'NONE') + ' has nowhere to deliver and overflow sell is disabled - routing to scout fallback to discover higher-urgency undiscovered alternatives.'

'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': No selected ware after demand scoring. bestWare=' + (if $bestWare? and $bestWare != null then $bestWare.name else 'NONE') + ', bestUrgency=' + $bestUrgency + ', activeWare=' + (if this.$activeMiningWare? and this.$activeMiningWare != null then this.$activeMiningWare.name else 'NONE')

do_if.value: this.$autoDeployResourceProbes and not this.$stayAtHome and (not this.$gtNextScoutAt? or player.age ge this.$gtNextScoutAt)
$scoutProbeCount le 0 and $scoutCanRefill and (not this.$gtNextProbeResupplyAt? or player.age ge this.$gtNextProbeResupplyAt)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': scout fallback - no probes loaded, triggered GT_Maintenance for ' + this.$maxResourceProbesToBuy + ' probes (slider target)'
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': SCOUT recycling previous probe in ' + this.ship.sector.knownname + ' (no ware became reachable since last drop) - flying to pick up before redeploying elsewhere'

do_if.value: $scoutClaim.$Ship? and $scoutClaim.$Ship != null and $scoutClaim.$Ship.exists and $scoutClaim.$Ship != this.ship and $scoutClaim.$ExpiresAt? and player.age lt $scoutClaim.$ExpiresAt

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': SCOUT skipping ' + $scoutCandWare.name + ' - already claimed by fleet member ' + $scoutClaim.$Ship.idcode + ' (claim TTL remaining=' + ($scoutClaim.$ExpiresAt - player.age) + ')'

do_if.value: not $scoutClaim.$Ship? or $scoutClaim.$Ship == null or not $scoutClaim.$Ship.exists or not $scoutClaim.$ExpiresAt? or player.age ge $scoutClaim.$ExpiresAt
this.$gtScoutClaimWare? and this.$gtScoutClaimWare != null and this.$gtScoutClaimWare != $scoutWare and global.$GT_ScoutClaims.{this.$gtScoutClaimWare}?

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': SCOUT - flying to ' + $scoutSector.knownname + ' to discover ' + $scoutWare.name + ' (probes onboard=' + $scoutProbeCount + ', gateDist=' + this.ship.gatedistance.{$scoutSector} + ', fleet claim TTL=' + (2 * this.$demandRecheckInterval) + ')'

'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': SCOUT probe deployed in ' + this.ship.sector.knownname + ' for ' + $scoutWare.name + ' (probes remaining: ' + this.ship.ammostorage.{deployablecategory.resourceprobe}.count + ') - probe stays if mining resumes next slice, otherwise gets recycled on next scout entry'
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': SCOUT arrived but skipped probe deploy (operational probe already nearby OR sector illegal OR out of probes after move)'

'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': SCOUT move to ' + (if @$scoutSector.exists then $scoutSector.knownname else 'NONE') + ' failed or aborted - sector now=' + (if @this.ship.sector then this.ship.sector.knownname else 'NONE')

'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': SCOUT skipped - no safe undiscovered candidate sector found within ' + this.$maxGatherDistance + ' jumps for any of ' + $candidateWares.count + ' candidate ware(s)'

do_if.value: this.$idleParking and this.$minerIdleNoWorkCount ge 5 and this.ship.cargo.count == 0 and (not global.$GT_IdleParkingReleased? or not global.$GT_IdleParkingReleased.{this.ship}?)

set_value.name: $minerIdleHome
set_value.exact: if this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists then this.$homeStation else (if this.$homeSector? and this.$homeSector.exists then this.$homeSector else null)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': idle parking threshold reached - parking at ' + $minerIdleHome.knownname

set_value.name: $overflowSearchRefSector
set_value.exact: if $range? and $range.isclass.sector then $range else (if $range? and $range.sector? then @$range.sector else this.sector)

do_if.value: this.ship.isplayerowned and this.$maxSellDistance le 0 and $overflowSearchRefSector.isclass.sector and not $overflowSellSpaces.indexof.{$overflowSearchRefSector}

set_value.name: $overflowSearchHomeSector
set_value.exact: if this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists and this.$homeStation.sector? then @$this.$homeStation.sector else $overflowSearchRefSector

do_while.value: this.$minerOverflowIndex? and this.$minerOverflowCandidateWares? and this.$minerOverflowIndex le this.$minerOverflowCandidateWares.count

do_if.value: this.$minerOverflowIndex? and this.$minerOverflowCandidateWares? and this.$minerOverflowIndex le this.$minerOverflowCandidateWares.count

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Overflow mining ware selected by live sell opportunities: ' + $selectedWare.name + ' (offers=' + $overflowBestOffers + ')'
'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Overflow mode but no sell opportunities for candidate wares. Waiting.'

do_if.value: this.$idleParking and this.$minerIdleNoWorkCount ge 5 and this.ship.cargo.count == 0 and (not global.$GT_IdleParkingReleased? or not global.$GT_IdleParkingReleased.{this.ship}?)

set_value.name: $minerIdleHome
set_value.exact: if this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists then this.$homeStation else (if this.$homeSector? and this.$homeSector.exists then this.$homeSector else null)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': idle parking threshold reached - parking at ' + $minerIdleHome.knownname

do_if.value: this.$autoDeployResourceProbes and not this.$stayAtHome and $candidateWares? and $candidateWares.count gt 0 and $wareReachable? and this.ship.cargo.free.all gt 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Overflow wait routing to SCOUT. selected=' + $selectedWare.name + ' is primary-capped, overflowAllowed=0; at least one candidate ware is unreachable (probable undiscovered alternative); cargo has ' + this.ship.cargo.free.all + ' free space. Forcing scout fallback instead of demand-recheck wait.'

'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Overflow wait. selected=' + $selectedWare.name + ', urgency=' + this.$activeMiningUrgency + ', overflowAllowed=0, cargoFree=' + this.ship.cargo.free.all + '/' + this.ship.cargo.capacity.all + ' (' + (if this.ship.cargo.capacity.all gt 0 then (this.ship.cargo.free.all * 100) / this.ship.cargo.capacity.all else 0) + '% free). Standing by until a buyer becomes available or the player intervenes.'

do_if.value: this.$idleParking and this.$minerIdleNoWorkCount ge 5 and this.ship.cargo.count == 0 and (not global.$GT_IdleParkingReleased? or not global.$GT_IdleParkingReleased.{this.ship}?)

set_value.name: $minerIdleHome
set_value.exact: if this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists then this.$homeStation else (if this.$homeSector? and this.$homeSector.exists then this.$homeSector else null)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': idle parking threshold reached - parking at ' + $minerIdleHome.knownname

do_while.value: this.$minerPrimaryIndex? and this.$minerPrimaryDemandStations? and this.$minerPrimaryIndex le this.$minerPrimaryDemandStations.count

do_if.value: this.$fleetBalancing and global.$GT_MinerIntents? and global.$GT_MinerIntents.{$stationEval}? and global.$GT_MinerIntents.{$stationEval}.{this.$minerPrimarySelectedWare}?

$intent? and $intent.$intentAmount? and $intent.$intentAmount gt 0 and $intent.$eta? and $intent.$eta le $intentHorizon and $intent.$phase? and ($intent.$phase == 'mining' or $intent.$phase == 'hauling' or $intent.$phase == 'delivering') and $intentShip? and $intentShip.exists and $intentShip.isoperational and $intentShipIsMinerControlled
this.$minerPrimaryIndex? and this.$minerPrimaryDemandStations? and this.$minerPrimaryIndex le this.$minerPrimaryDemandStations.count
this.$assignToStation and this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists and $primaryDeliveryStation? and $primaryDeliveryStation.exists and (not $overflowSellMode)

(not this.ship.commander? or not this.ship.commander.exists or this.ship.commander == this.ship or this.ship.commander.isclass.station) and ((not this.ship.commander?) or this.ship.commander != $primaryDeliveryStation)
this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship

do_while.value: this.$minerAssignIndex? and this.$minerAssignDemandStations? and this.$minerAssignIndex le this.$minerAssignDemandStations.count

do_if.value: this.$minerAssignIndex? and this.$minerAssignDemandStations? and this.$minerAssignIndex le this.$minerAssignDemandStations.count

do_while.value: this.$minerIntentBuildIndex? and this.$minerIntentBuildDemandStations? and this.$minerIntentBuildIndex le this.$minerIntentBuildDemandStations.count

do_if.value: this.$fleetBalancing and global.$GT_MinerIntents? and global.$GT_MinerIntents.{$stationEval}? and global.$GT_MinerIntents.{$stationEval}.{this.$minerIntentBuildSelectedWare}?

$intent? and $intent.$intentAmount? and $intent.$intentAmount gt 0 and $intent.$eta? and $intent.$eta le $intentHorizon and $intent.$phase? and ($intent.$phase == 'mining' or $intent.$phase == 'hauling' or $intent.$phase == 'delivering') and $intentShip? and $intentShip.exists and $intentShip.isoperational and $intentShipIsMinerControlled
this.$minerIntentBuildIndex? and this.$minerIntentBuildDemandStations? and this.$minerIntentBuildIndex le this.$minerIntentBuildDemandStations.count

do_while.value: this.$minerIntentPhaseIndex? and this.$minerIntentStations? and this.$minerIntentPhaseIndex le this.$minerIntentStations.count

do_if.value: this.$minerIntentPhaseIndex? and this.$minerIntentStations? and this.$minerIntentPhaseIndex le this.$minerIntentStations.count

do_while.value: this.$minerDiagIndex? and this.$minerDiagDemandStations? and this.$minerDiagIndex le this.$minerDiagDemandStations.count

do_if.value: this.$minerDiagIndex? and this.$minerDiagDemandStations? and this.$minerDiagIndex le this.$minerDiagDemandStations.count

set_value.name: $minerRuntimeMaxSellRaw
set_value.exact: if this.ship.defaultorder.$maxSellDistance? then this.ship.defaultorder.$maxSellDistance else this.$maxSellDistance

do_elseif.value: this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship and this.ship.defaultorder? and this.ship.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.ship.commander.defaultorder?

do_if.value: this.ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{this.ship.pilot}.$Level?

set_value.name: this.$miner_prevDockedStation
set_value.exact: if this.ship.dockedat? and this.ship.dockedat.exists and this.ship.dockedat.isclass.station then this.ship.dockedat else null

do_while.value: this.$minerPrevStationIndex? and this.$minerPrevStationDemandStations? and this.$minerPrevStationIndex le this.$minerPrevStationDemandStations.count

do_if.value: this.$minerPrevStationIndex? and this.$minerPrevStationDemandStations? and this.$minerPrevStationIndex le this.$minerPrevStationDemandStations.count

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Run mining slice ware=' + $selectedWare.name + ', urgency=' + this.$activeMiningUrgency + ', overflow=' + $overflowSellMode + ', primaryStation=' + (if $primaryDeliveryStation? and $primaryDeliveryStation.exists then $primaryDeliveryStation.idcode else 'NONE') + ', range=' + (if $range? then $range.knownname else 'null') + ', rangeClass=' + (if $range? then $range.class else 'null') + ', stayAtHome=' + this.$stayAtHome + ', minbuy=' + $minbuy + ', maxbuy=' + $maxbuy + ', minsell=' + $minsell + ', maxsell=' + $maxsell + ', cargoBefore=' + this.$miner_prevCargoTotal + ', commander=' + (if this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists then this.ship.commander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', default=' + (if this.ship.defaultorder? then @this.ship.defaultorder.id else 'NONE')

set_value.name: $autoResupplyEnabled
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_Config? and global.$GT_Config.$Maintenance? and global.$GT_Config.$Maintenance.$AutoResupply? then global.$GT_Config.$Maintenance.$AutoResupply else 1

do_if.value: not this.$gtNextCollectorResupplyAt? or player.age ge this.$gtNextCollectorResupplyAt

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': COLLECTOR PRE-CHECK FAILED - missing ' + $collectorMissing + ' drones for selected ware ' + $selectedWare.name + ' (capital, waretransport=' + $selectedWare.waretransport + '). Signaled vanilla resupply (urgent) + GT_DoMaintenance. Standing by ' + this.$demandRecheckInterval + 's; throttled next collector resupply for 5min.'

'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': COLLECTOR PRE-CHECK FAILED - missing ' + $collectorMissing + ' drones for ' + $selectedWare.name + '; collector resupply already in flight (' + (this.$gtNextCollectorResupplyAt - player.age) + 's TTL remaining). Standing by ' + this.$demandRecheckInterval + 's.'

'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': COLLECTOR PRE-CHECK FAILED - missing ' + $collectorMissing + ' drones for ' + $selectedWare.name + '. AutoResupply is DISABLED in GT settings - cannot auto-buy. Standing by ' + this.$demandRecheckInterval + 's. Enable Settings -> Maintenance -> AutoResupply, or manually equip the missing collector drones at any wharf, to allow this miner to mine.'

set_value.name: $strictGatherSector
set_value.exact: if this.$stayAtHome and this.$homeSector? and this.$homeSector.exists then this.$homeSector else null

set_value.name: $currentDockedStation
set_value.exact: if this.ship.dockedat? and this.ship.dockedat.exists and this.ship.dockedat.isclass.station then this.ship.dockedat else null

do_elseif.value: this.$miner_prevDockedStation? and this.$miner_prevDockedStation.exists and this.$miner_prevStationCargoByStation? and this.$miner_prevStationCargoByStation.{this.$miner_prevDockedStation}?

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': Slice complete ware=' + $selectedWare.name + ', cargoAfter=' + $cargoAfterDelivery + ', cargoDelta=' + $netCargoDelta + ', stationDelivery=' + $confirmedStationDelivery + ', delivered=' + $deliveredAmount + ', dockedAt=' + (if $currentDockedStation? and $currentDockedStation.exists then $currentDockedStation.idcode else 'NONE') + ', commander=' + (if this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists then this.ship.commander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', default=' + (if this.ship.defaultorder? then @this.ship.defaultorder.id else 'NONE')

do_if.value: this.$minerDetachedForOverflow and this.$assignToStation and this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists

do_elseif.value: this.$assignToStation and this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists and (not this.ship.commander? or not this.ship.commander.exists or this.ship.commander == this.ship or this.ship.commander.isclass.station)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': on_abort cleanup start. commander=' + (if this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists then this.ship.commander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', default=' + (if this.ship.defaultorder? then @this.ship.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ', overflowDetached=' + this.$minerDetachedForOverflow

do_if.value: this.$minerDetachedForOverflow and this.$assignToStation and this.$homeStation? and this.$homeStation.exists and (not this.ship.commander? or not this.ship.commander.exists or this.ship.commander == this.ship or this.ship.commander.isclass.station)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': on_abort restored commander assignment after overflow detach'

do_if.value: this.$minerAssignedWare? and this.$minerAssignedStations? and this.$minerAssignedStations.count gt 0
this.$minerIntentWare? and this.$minerIntentWare != null and this.$minerIntentStations? and this.$minerIntentStations.count gt 0

do_elseif.value: $abortDefaultOrder == 'Assist' and this.ship.defaultorder? and this.ship.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@this.ship.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}

do_if.value: not $abortHasDirectGTOrder and this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship and this.ship.commander.defaultorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id}

do_elseif.value: not $abortHasDirectGTOrder and this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship and this.ship.commander.defaultorder? and @this.ship.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@this.ship.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}

debug_text.text: '[GT-Miner-DIAG] ON_ABORT ship=' + this.ship.idcode + ', default=' + (if $abortDefaultOrder? then $abortDefaultOrder else 'NONE') + ', current=' + (if this.ship.order? then @this.ship.order.id else 'NONE') + ', hasDirectGT=' + $abortHasDirectGTOrder + ', hasGTCommander=' + $abortHasGTCommander + ', commander=' + (if this.ship.commander? and this.ship.commander.exists and this.ship.commander != this.ship then this.ship.commander.idcode else 'NONE') + ', orders=' + (if this.ship.orders? then this.ship.orders.count else 0)

'[GT-Miner] ' + this.ship.idcode + ': on_abort detected active GT control (default=' + (if $abortDefaultOrder? then $abortDefaultOrder else 'NONE') + ', hasDirect=' + $abortHasDirectGTOrder + ', hasGTCommander=' + $abortHasGTCommander + ') - skipping GT_Order_Cancelled'

do_if.value: this.$gtScoutClaimWare? and this.$gtScoutClaimWare != null and global.$GT_ScoutClaims? and global.$GT_ScoutClaims.{this.$gtScoutClaimWare}?
